pocetna.desc: A man who lit the world
izumi.text: Nikola Tesla was an inventor and innovator with over 300 patents worldwide. His inventions revolutionized the way we use electrical energy and communication.
izumi.teslaCoil.name: Tesla Coil
izumi.teslaCoil.desc: A high-voltage transformer producing high-frequency currents, used in wireless energy experiments.
izumi.ac.name: Alternating Current (AC System)
izumi.ac.desc: A system for transmitting electrical energy over long distances with minimal losses.
izumi.inductionMotor.name: Induction Motor
izumi.inductionMotor.desc: A motor that uses a rotating magnetic field, reliable and widely used in industry.
izumi.wirelessEnergy.name: Wireless Energy Transmission
izumi.wirelessEnergy.desc: A concept of transmitting electrical energy without wires using electromagnetic waves.
izumi.radio.name: Radio Technology
izumi.radio.desc: Foundation of wireless communication using electromagnetic waves.
izumi.turbine.name: Tesla Turbine
izumi.turbine.desc: A bladeless turbine using fluid viscosity to move the rotor.
izumi.fluorescent.name: Fluorescent Lighting
izumi.fluorescent.desc: Efficient lighting using gas and electrical discharge to produce light.
izumi.remote.name: Remote Control
izumi.remote.desc: First system for controlling devices remotely using radio signals.
izumi.plasmaBall.name: Tesla Sphere
izumi.plasmaBall.desc: A glass sphere filled with gas showing electrical discharges.
izumi.xrays.name: X-ray Experiments
izumi.xrays.desc: Early experiments with X-rays and their application in science and medicine.
timeline.birth.title: Birth
timeline.birth.content: Born in Smiljan on July 10. From an early age, he showed interest in science and electricity.
timeline.studies.title: Studies
timeline.studies.content: Enrolled at the Graz University of Technology and began studying electrical machines.
timeline.move.title: Move to USA
timeline.move.content: Moved to New York City and worked for Thomas Edison. Their cooperation ended quickly.
timeline.ac.title: AC System
timeline.ac.content: Developed and patented devices for long-distance electrical transmission.
timeline.coil.title: Tesla Coil
timeline.coil.content: Invented the Tesla Coil, producing high-frequency electrical currents.
timeline.plant.title: Power Plant
timeline.plant.content: AC system used at Niagara Falls power plant, one of the first major projects.
timeline.death.title: Death
timeline.death.content: Died on January 7, 1943, in New York City.
